title: hieracium umbrosum subsp. catagraphum
intro: Hieracium umbrosum subsp. catagraphum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium umbrosum subsp. catagraphum include its potential to help alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use requires caution due to potential interactions and side effects.
